functions.name: zee.modules.load_module
documentation:
Load a module from a file location

Args:
    modname (str): module file path relative to location like a/c/c.py
    location (str): root path of the module. If the module has relative
        imports like from . import, location must be specified!

Returns:
    mudule

functions.name: zee.dicts.update_dict_by_string
documentation:
Update a target dict by a path separated by dot

Args:
    target (dict): target dict need to be updated
    path (str): a string with the form of 'a.b.c'
    value (Any, optional): value to be set to the target.

functions.name: zee.dicts.string_to_dict
documentation:
Convert a string separated by dot to a dict

Args:
    path (str): a string with the form of 'a.b.c'

functions.name: zee.dicts.merge_dict
documentation:
Merge source to target

Args:
    target (dict): dict to be merged to
    source (dict): dict to be merged from

Raises:
    KeyError: if key in target conflicts with source

Yields:
    tuple: a tuple contains the key and value

functions.name: zee.dicts.query_dict_from_string
documentation:
get value from dict with path

Args:
    path (str): a string with the form of a.b.c
    source (dict, optional): source to be queried. Defaults to {}.

Raises:
    KeyError: if path not found

Returns:
    _type_: value from path
